content.speakerText: Hi Alex! Haven’t seen you in ages. What’s new with you?
content.speakerTextCn: 嗨，Alex！好久不见，你最近有什么新鲜事吗？
expectedAnswers: Actually, I started learning guitar—I’ve been practicing three times a week!
I switched jobs last month and now I’m working remotely from home.
Not much, but I adopted a puppy last weekend—he’s a handful but so cute!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否回应了'What's new'并分享真实生活变化
语言准确性：使用恰当的时态（现在完成时、过去时）和自然表达
表达自然度：语气轻松、有情感，避免简单回答'Nothing'或'Fine'
关键词覆盖：是否包含具体事件（learning guitar, switched jobs, adopted a puppy）

content.scenarioHint: 你在咖啡店偶遇一位好久不见的同事，想自然开启对话并关心对方近况
content.speakerText: Hey! It's been ages—what have you been up to lately?
content.speakerTextCn: 嘿！好久不见，你最近在忙什么？
expectedAnswers: I've been swamped with work, but I finally started yoga to unwind!
Not much—just traveling a bit and catching up on sleep!
Actually, I adopted a dog last month—she's my new best friend!
Same old routine, but I picked up cooking. Trying new recipes every weekend.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否自然地回应了对方的关心并展开话题
语言准确性：语法和时态使用是否正确
表达自然度：是否符合日常英语口语习惯
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'lately', 'been up to', 或相关生活细节词

content.scenarioHint: 你在健身房遇到一位熟人，想友好地开启对话并询问对方近期的健身进展
content.speakerText: Hey! Haven't seen you around in weeks—how's your fitness routine going?
content.speakerTextCn: 嘿！好几周没见到你了，你的健身计划进行得怎么样？
expectedAnswers: Much better! I’ve been hitting the gym three times a week and feeling way stronger.
To be honest, I slipped a bit, but I’m getting back on track this month.
It’s been awesome—I just ran my first 5K last weekend!
Slow progress, but I’m consistent. Trying to focus on consistency over intensity.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否回应了关于健身进展的提问并提供具体信息
语言准确性：是否正确使用完成时态和相关运动词汇
表达自然度：是否避免机械回答，体现真实生活语气
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'fitness routine', 'going', 'recent progress' 等关键词
